summary: BidBlitz Händler-Gutscheine Premium Features Testing Complete - All new features verified: 1) Orange Händler-Gutscheine Banner on homepage, 2) Premium Partner display with golden border and 'Premium Partner' badge, 3) Premium Partners sorted first in list, 4) Admin Premium endpoints working, 5) Extended merchant details (logo, photos, opening hours, etc.)

haendler_gutscheine_banner_homepage.description: Orange Händler-Gutscheine Banner present on homepage under 'Entdecke alle Features' link

details.banner_text: 🎫 Händler-Gutscheine - Ersteigere Gutscheine bei lokalen Partnern!

premium_partner_golden_frame.description: Premium Partners displayed with golden border (border-2 border-yellow-400) and ring styling

premium_partner_sorted_first.description: Premium Partners appear at the top of the merchants list

details.sorting_logic: Premium first, then by voucher count

admin_set_premium_endpoint.description: POST /api/merchant-vouchers/admin/set-premium successfully sets merchant as Premium

merchant_detail_extended_info.description: Merchant detail page shows extended info: logo, photos, opening hours, website, social media

admin_panel_premium_tab.description: Admin Panel has 'Premium Partner' tab in AdminMerchantVouchers component

critical_code_review_comments: Auctions.js lines 1365-1386: Händler-Gutscheine Banner correctly placed after 'Entdecke alle Features' link with orange gradient styling
MerchantVouchersPage.js: Premium Partner cards have golden border (border-2 border-yellow-400 ring-2 ring-yellow-400/20) and Crown icon badge
merchant_vouchers.py line 104: Merchants sorted by is_premium first, then by voucher_count
AdminMerchantVouchers.js: Premium Tab added with set/remove premium functionality
merchant_vouchers.py lines 220-281: Admin endpoints for set-premium and remove-premium working correctly
seed_data_creation: Test vouchers created via API during testing (TEST_Voucher_*, TEST_Integration_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Händler-Gutscheine Premium features fully implemented: 1) Orange banner on homepage links to /haendler-gutscheine, 2) Premium Partners have golden border and 'Premium Partner' badge with Crown icon, 3) Premium Partners sorted first in list, 4) Admin can set/remove premium via POST /api/merchant-vouchers/admin/set-premium and /remove-premium/{id}, 5) Merchant detail page shows extended info (logo, photos, opening_hours, website, social_media, specialties, payment_methods)
